scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @siedler/shared-types && npm run build --workspace @siedler/game-engine && npm run build --workspace @siedler/realtime && npm run build --workspace @siedler/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @siedler/game-engine && npm run test --workspace @siedler/realtime
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @siedler/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace @siedler/game-engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @siedler/realtime && npm run typecheck --workspace @siedler/web
